channel.title: QR Peach
channel.description: QR Peach paths: App, Create, Learn, and Developers with current page updates.

item.title: QR Peach Home
item.description: Homepage with the four QR Peach paths: App, Create, Learn, and Developers.

item.title: QR Peach Learn
item.description: Learn QR structure, encoding flow, ECC, masking, and capacity tradeoffs.

item.title: QR Peach Create
item.description: Create QR payloads in browser and inspect bytes, bitstream, ECC, and module placement.

item.title: QR Peach Developers
item.description: Integrate qrpeach.js with API entry points, npm package, CDN URLs, and release assets.

item.title: QR Peach Download
item.description: Download qrpeach.js from npm, jsDelivr, UNPKG, or GitHub release assets.

item.title: QR Peach Demo
item.description: Quick browser example that generates an SVG QR code with qrpeach.js.
